zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Normandie於大約0985年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen53歲，母親Gunnor de Crépon comtesse de Rouen47歲。她於1002年4月5日與Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1052年3月6日在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆維古姆 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Normandie于大约0985年出生在法国諾門迪时，她的父亲Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen53岁，母亲Gunnor de Crépon comtesse de Rouen47岁。她于1002年4月5日与Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England在英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1052年3月6日在英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆維古姆 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Normandie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Alain, Serge, Adrien, Andre, Aurore, Celine, Clovis, Emile, Gaetan, Gilles, Laurier.
French: from a diminutive of   Normand  . Compare   Normandy  .

variants.name: Normand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Pierre, Amie, Donat, Emile, Herve, Jacques, Jean Noel, Jean-Michel.
French and Breton (mainly Finistère; also Le Normand): habitational name for someone from Normandy, a region in northern France (see Norman ). Compare Lenormand .

variants.name: Normandy
meanings: English: habitational name from Normandy in northern France. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Normandie was born about 0985, in Normandy, France, her father, Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen, was 53 and her mother, Gunnor de Crépon comtesse de Rouen, was 47. She married Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England on 5 April 1002, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 6 March 1052, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Winchester Cathedral, Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Normandie est née environ 0985, à Normandie, France, son père, Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Gunnor de Crépon comtesse de Rouen, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England le 5 avril 1002, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 mars 1052, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Winchester Cathedral, Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Winchester Cathedral, Hampshire, Kingdom: Winchester Cathedral, Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Normandie um 0985 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen 53 und ihre Mutter Gunnor de Crépon comtesse de Rouen 47. Sie hat am 5. April 1002 in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. März 1052 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Winchester Cathedral, Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Normandie è nata il circa 0985 nel Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Gunnor de Crépon comtesse de Rouen, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England il 5 aprile 1002, nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 marzo 1052, nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Winchester Cathedral, Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Normandieが約0985年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouenは53歳，母Gunnor de Crépon comtesse de Rouenは47歳であった。1002年4月5日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターでÆthelred 'the Unready' King of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1052年3月6日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターウィンチェスター カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.Winchester Cathedral, Hampshire, Kingdom: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터 윈체스터 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Normandie(이)가 대략 0985년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gunnor de Crépon comtesse de Rouen(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1002년 4월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1052년 3월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터 윈체스터 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.Winchester Cathedral, Hampshire, Kingdom: Winchester Cathedral, Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Normandie nasceu aproximadamente 0985, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Gunnor de Crépon comtesse de Rouen, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England em 5 de abril de 1002, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 6 de março de 1052, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Winchester Cathedral, Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Winchester Cathedral, Hampshire, Kingdom: Winchester Cathedral, Winchester, Hampshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Winchester Cathedral, Hampshire, Kingdom: винчестир кэтедраль, винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Normandie родилась около 0985 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Gunnor de Crépon comtesse de Rouen, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England 5 апреля 1002 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 марта 1052 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности винчестир кэтедраль, винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Normandie nació aproximadamente 0985, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Richard 'Sans Peur' de Normandie Comte de Rouen, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Gunnor de Crépon comtesse de Rouen, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England el 5 de abril de 1002, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de marzo de 1052, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Winchester Cathedral, Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
